last_worker_summary: Seed data is correct. I bumped `STORAGE_VERSION` from `3` to `4` in `src/App.tsx` so that any browser profile holding stale version-3 localStorage (with 'Design autonomous replanning loop' / High priority) discards it and re-initializes from `INITIAL_COLUMNS`, which already has the correct values: title `'This is a test'`, priority `'medium'`, `assigneeId: null` (renders as `'Assignee: None'`).
